arts.ttl: 'So efficient': Kingsley Coman suggests Liverpool have a player who's better than Arsenal's Bukayo Saka
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal have two of the best wingers in world football in Mohamed Salah and Bukayo Saka. Mohamed Salah has been an absolute revelation...

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach vs Bayern München preview: Pace-setters look to pick up where they left off
arts.sum: League leaders Bayern München look to restart the Bundesliga campaign similarly to how they entered the winter break, after beating RB Leipzig by five goals to one. Vincent Kompany's men prepare to face a Borussia Mönchengladbach side within touching distance of the European positions.

arts.ttl: Gladbach vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Before we get started, here’s a list of players that Bayern can’t use for this match: Jamal Musiala, Josip Stanišić, Hiroki Itō, João Palhinha, Daniel Peretz and Sacha Boey are definitely ruled out of Saturday's game against Borussia Mönchengladbach

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany ready for Bayern Munich’s clash vs. Gladbach
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is ready to get things going for the second half of the season and sounds as if he is very eager to see his squad face off with Borussia Mönchengladbach on Saturday. But now we’re concentrating on what’s important: winning the next game,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany can look to the 80s for guidance on the second half of the season; Throwing it back to The Doors; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: While unlucky circumstances led to Bayern Munich ’s demise in the DFB-Pokal, Kompany might not get a pass from fans (or the club) if the Bavarians falter in the remaining competitions. : If there is one, singular criticism of Kompany that most Bayern Munich fans agree upon, it is that the coach has not rotated enough.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich players name the toughest opponents they’ve ever faced; some may surprise you
arts.sum: In an interview with Sky Sport DE, Jamal Musiala, Harry Kane, Joshua Kimmich, Serge Gnabry, Matthys Tel and Aleksandar Pavlović gave some insight on the toughest players they’ve ever faced, and some are surprising (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). It would have been interesting to ask a few Bayern defenders as well to see who some of the toughest attackers they’ve ever faced were.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich likes Jonas Urbig as apprentice to Manuel Neuer for next season
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg, Bayern Munich has identified its pick to potentially succeed Manuel Neuer — FC Köln goalkeeper Jonas Urbig: Jonas #Urbig is currently Bayern’s top candidate for next summer to become the backup goalkeeper behind Manuel #Neuer, who is set to extend his contract until 2026 in the coming days.

arts.ttl: Ditched Tottenham youngster thinks he’s better than Solanke, but still has Harry Kane as best in world
arts.sum: There’s nothing like a bit of confidence, especially for a striker, and it seems former Tottenham man Troy Parrott is brimming with it at this moment in time. That’s at least if his latest appearance on a video for ESPN Netherlands is anything to by, as he ranks himself higher than the likes of Dominic The post Ditched Tottenham youngster thinks he’s better than Solanke, but still has Harry Kane as best in world appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich considering offering Thomas Müller a new contract
arts.sum: At Bayern Munich’s pre-match press conference Director of Sport Max Eberl confirmed that Bayern will engage in talks with Thomas Müller over a new contract. Müller’s contract at the Allianz…

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies ‘further away’ from Real Madrid with Bayern Munich meeting to come
arts.sum: For several months, it looked as if Alphonso Davies would be moving to Real Madrid come what may this July. However with Bayern Munich making considerable process, that prospect is now fading into the distance.
